overall.description: A cinematic third-person view inside a medieval fantasy tavern (The Three Broomsticks from Hogwarts Legacy), featuring a character seated at a wooden table near a stone fireplace. The scene is rendered in a game engine with warm artificial lighting, detailed wooden timber framing, and a cozy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy medieval tavern interior with central fireplace

agents.ego_description: character seated on wooden stool at table, occasionally shifting posture and looking around the tavern

entered.detail: carved wooden tavern sign mounted on upper beam with medieval lettering
large stone hearth with burning fire providing warm ambient light
thick timber column supporting the upper level and ceiling beams
large ornate framed painting of a figure in medieval dress hanging on wall
cluster of smaller framed artworks on the back wall above tables
rustic wooden dining table where the character is seated
exposed wooden ceiling beams and upper floor structure

segments.scene_description: The camera maintains a steady third-person view of a character sitting at a wooden table inside The Three Broomsticks tavern. The warm glow from the stone fireplace illuminates the timber-framed interior, while medieval decor including a large portrait and hanging sign establish the fantasy setting. The character remains seated throughout, occasionally shifting position while observing the cozy, empty tavern environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze upon a character seated within the warm, secluded interior of The Three Broomsticks tavern. It begins with a focused view of the character at a wooden table, where the flickering glow from a stone fireplace casts deep shadows across the timber-framed walls. As the camera lingers, the perspective subtly encompasses the surrounding medieval decor, drawing attention to a large portrait and a hanging sign that anchor the fantasy setting. The scene remains intimate and still, shifting only as the character adjusts their position while observing the quiet, cozy emptiness of the room.
